name: NATO Treaty 1949 (North Atlantic Treaty / Washington Treaty)
summary: The North Atlantic Treaty (NATO Treaty or Washington Treaty) is a regional supranational meta-framework foundational-NATO-treaty framework adopted by the 12 founding North Atlantic states in Washington — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern transatlantic regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal collective-defence-only framework via Article 5 (NATO Treaty signed 4 April 1949 in Washington DC by Belgium + Canada + Denmark + France + Iceland + Italy + Luxembourg + Netherlands + Norway + Portugal + UK + US + effective 24 August 1949 — formal foundational NATO treaty framework establishing comprehensive NATO organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-regional-treaty frameworks which operate on economic-integration frameworks, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern transatlantic regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal collective-defence-only framework via Article 5 framework + oldest modern collective-defence supranational binding-treaty framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 5 collective-defence framework invoked once after September 11 attacks framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sweden + Finland 2023-2024 post-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine accession framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Article 5 Collective Defence framework (NATO Treaty Article 5 framework providing 'an armed attack against one or more of them in Europe or North America shall be considered an attack against them all' + 'each of them, in exercise of the right of individual or collective self-defence recognised by Article 51 of the Charter of the United Nations, will assist the Party or Parties so attacked' — formal foundational Article 5 collective-defence framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 5 collective-defence framework with operational invocation framework via 12 September 2001 invocation after September 11 attacks framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal collective-defence-invocation framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal NATO Membership Expansion framework (NATO expansion via Greece + Turkey 1952 + West Germany 1955 + Spain 1982 + Czech Republic + Hungary + Poland 1999 + Bulgaria + Estonia + Latvia + Lithuania + Romania + Slovakia + Slovenia 2004 + Albania + Croatia 2009 + Montenegro 2017 + North Macedonia 2020 + Finland 4 April 2023 + Sweden 7 March 2024 expanding NATO from 12 founding to 32 current members — formal foundational NATO expansion framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sweden + Finland 2023-2024 post-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine accession framework ending Sweden + Finland historic neutrality framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal NATO 2% GDP Defence Spending Pledge framework (NATO 2014 Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge committing NATO members to 2% GDP defence spending by 2024 + NATO 2025 Hague Summit 5% GDP defence spending pledge by 2035 — formal foundational NATO defence-spending-pledge framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal defence-spending-pledge framework with operational monitoring framework). The NATO Treaty is binding upon 32 NATO member states as of 2026 — comprehensive transatlantic regional coverage framework. The Treaty is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal NATO framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal transatlantic-military-family-cross-border framework. The NATO North Atlantic Council + NATO Military Committee + NATO Secretary General + NATO Supreme Allied Commander Europe SACEUR are the formal NATO bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The NATO Treaty is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: NATO Treaty
statutory_framework.relevance: North Atlantic Treaty signed 4 April 1949 in Washington DC by 12 founding states + effective 24 August 1949 — formal foundational NATO treaty framework establishing comprehensive NATO organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: NATO Treaty Article 5
statutory_framework.relevance: NATO Treaty Article 5 framework on collective-defence — formal foundational Article 5 collective-defence framework + invoked once 12 September 2001 after September 11 attacks framework.

statutory_framework.title: NATO Treaty Article 6
statutory_framework.relevance: NATO Treaty Article 6 framework on geographic scope — formal foundational NATO geographic-scope framework limiting Article 5 framework to attacks in Europe + North America + North Atlantic + Mediterranean + on islands under jurisdiction framework.

statutory_framework.citation: NATO Treaty Article 10 (Open Door Membership Framework)
statutory_framework.title: NATO Treaty Article 10
statutory_framework.relevance: NATO Treaty Article 10 framework on open-door membership — formal foundational NATO membership-expansion framework.

statutory_framework.citation: NATO 2014 Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge
statutory_framework.title: NATO Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge
statutory_framework.relevance: NATO 2014 Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge committing NATO members to 2% GDP defence spending by 2024 — formal foundational NATO defence-spending-pledge framework.

statutory_framework.citation: NATO 2025 Hague Summit 5% GDP Defence Spending Pledge
statutory_framework.title: NATO Hague Summit 5% GDP Pledge
statutory_framework.relevance: NATO 2025 Hague Summit 5% GDP defence spending pledge by 2035 — formal reinforced NATO defence-spending-pledge framework.

apex_courts.name: NATO North Atlantic Council (NAC)
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for NATO.

apex_courts.name: NATO Military Committee
apex_courts.role: Formal senior military body for NATO.

apex_courts.name: NATO Secretary General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for NATO.

apex_courts.name: NATO Supreme Allied Commander Europe (SACEUR)
apex_courts.role: Formal senior NATO military commander body.

anonymisation_convention: NATO-related communications operate via state-state framework via North Atlantic Council; individual communications not formally accepted under NATO framework.

key_developments.title: Treaty of Brussels
key_developments.description: Treaty of Brussels signed 17 March 1948 by Belgium + France + Luxembourg + Netherlands + UK — predecessor framework to NATO Treaty.

key_developments.title: NATO Treaty signed
key_developments.description: North Atlantic Treaty signed 4 April 1949 in Washington DC by 12 founding states + effective 24 August 1949 — formal foundational NATO treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: Greece + Turkey join NATO
key_developments.description: Greece + Turkey joined NATO 18 February 1952 — formal first NATO expansion framework.

key_developments.title: West Germany joins NATO + Warsaw Pact
key_developments.description: West Germany joined NATO 9 May 1955 + Warsaw Pact established 14 May 1955 in response — formal NATO expansion framework + Cold-War-bipolar framework operational.

key_developments.title: Warsaw Pact dissolved
key_developments.description: Warsaw Pact dissolved 1 July 1991 — formal NATO post-Cold-War framework operational.

key_developments.title: Czech Republic + Hungary + Poland join NATO + NATO bombing of Yugoslavia
key_developments.description: Czech Republic + Hungary + Poland joined NATO 12 March 1999 + NATO bombing of Yugoslavia 24 March - 10 June 1999 — formal NATO Eastern-expansion + first non-Article-5 military operation framework.

key_developments.title: Article 5 invoked after September 11 attacks
key_developments.description: NATO Article 5 invoked 12 September 2001 after September 11 attacks against United States — formal first + only Article 5 invocation framework.

key_developments.title: Big Bang NATO expansion to Baltic + Central Europe
key_developments.description: Bulgaria + Estonia + Latvia + Lithuania + Romania + Slovakia + Slovenia joined NATO 29 March 2004 — formal Big Bang NATO expansion framework.

key_developments.title: NATO Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge
key_developments.description: NATO Wales Summit 4-5 September 2014 Defence Investment Pledge committing NATO members to 2% GDP defence spending by 2024 — formal NATO defence-spending-pledge framework.

key_developments.title: Russia invades Ukraine + Finland + Sweden apply for NATO
key_developments.description: Russia invades Ukraine 24 February 2022 + Finland + Sweden applied for NATO membership 18 May 2022 ending historic neutrality framework — formal NATO 2022-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine response framework.

key_developments.title: Finland joins NATO
key_developments.description: Finland joined NATO 4 April 2023 ending Finland historic neutrality — formal NATO Finland-accession framework.

key_developments.title: Sweden joins NATO
key_developments.description: Sweden joined NATO 7 March 2024 ending Sweden historic neutrality framework — formal NATO Sweden-accession framework operating 32-NATO-member framework.

key_developments.title: NATO Hague Summit 5% GDP Pledge + Trump Round 2 tensions
key_developments.description: NATO 2025 Hague Summit 24-26 June 2025 5% GDP defence spending pledge by 2035 + Trump Round 2 NATO tensions framework — formal reinforced NATO defence-spending-pledge framework + Trump-NATO-tensions framework.

structural_findings: NATO Treaty operates a regional supranational binding-treaty framework — places NATO Treaty in the regional supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern transatlantic regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal collective-defence-only framework via Article 5 framework is structurally distinctive globally — oldest modern collective-defence supranational binding-treaty framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 5 collective-defence framework invoked once after September 11 attacks framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sweden + Finland 2023-2024 post-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine accession framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Article 5 Collective Defence framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 5 collective-defence framework with operational invocation framework via 12 September 2001 invocation after September 11 attacks framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal collective-defence-invocation framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal NATO Membership Expansion framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sweden + Finland 2023-2024 post-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine accession framework ending Sweden + Finland historic neutrality framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal NATO 2% GDP Defence Spending Pledge framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal defence-spending-pledge framework with operational monitoring framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating reinforced 5% GDP defence-spending-pledge framework via 2025 Hague Summit.
32 NATO member state ratification framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive transatlantic regional coverage framework.

1948 Treaty of Brussels + 1949 NATO Treaty + 1952 Greece + Turkey + 1955 West Germany + Warsaw Pact + 1991 Warsaw Pact dissolved + 1999 Czech + Hungary + Poland + Yugoslavia bombing + 2001 Article 5 invoked + 2004 Big Bang + 2014 Wales Summit + 2022 Russia invasion + Finland + Sweden apply + 2023 Finland joins + 2024 Sweden joins + 2025 Hague Summit + Trump Round 2 NATO-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

NATO Treaty + Article 5 + Article 6 + Article 10 + Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge + Hague Summit 5% GDP Pledge formal sextet framework with formal transatlantic-military-family-cross-border limited PA-intersection framework is structurally distinctive globally.
editorial_notes: NATO Treaty jurisdiction sidecar — regional supranational transatlantic foundational-NATO-treaty meta-framework (NATO Treaty 1949 + Article 5 Collective Defence + Article 6 Geographic Scope + Article 10 Open Door Membership + 1948 Treaty of Brussels predecessor + 1952 Greece + Turkey + 1955 West Germany + Warsaw Pact + 1991 Warsaw Pact dissolved + 1999 Eastern expansion + Yugoslavia bombing + 2001 Article 5 invoked September 11 + 2004 Big Bang + 2014 Wales Summit Defence Investment Pledge + 2022 Russia invades Ukraine + Finland + Sweden apply + 2023 Finland joins + 2024 Sweden joins + 2025 Hague Summit 5% GDP Pledge + Trump Round 2 NATO tensions). Only modern transatlantic regional supranational binding-treaty framework globally + oldest modern collective-defence supranational binding-treaty framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 5 collective-defence framework invoked once after September 11 attacks + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sweden + Finland 2023-2024 post-Russia-invasion-of-Ukraine accession framework + central jurisdiction of formal Article 5 Collective Defence framework + central jurisdiction of formal NATO Membership Expansion framework + central jurisdiction of formal 2% + 5% GDP defence-spending-pledge frameworks + 32 NATO member states + 1948 Treaty of Brussels + 1949 NATO Treaty + 1952 Greece + Turkey + 1955 West Germany + 1991 Warsaw Pact dissolved + 1999 Eastern expansion + Yugoslavia bombing + 2001 Article 5 invoked + 2004 Big Bang + 2014 Wales Summit + 2022 Russia invasion + Finland + Sweden apply + 2023 Finland + 2024 Sweden + 2025 Hague Summit + Trump Round 2 NATO-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: NATO framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal transatlantic-military-family-cross-border framework.
